title: lysimachia fistulosa var. fistulosa
intro: Lysimachia fistulosa var. fistulosa, also known as yellow loosestrife or bog loosestrife, is a perennial plant belonging to the primrose family that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lysimachia fistulosa var. fistulosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the leaves and stems typically used for herbal preparations.
